page.title: Profile
page.description: Manage your personal information and account settings for your ICCP account.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.phoneError: Use international format with country code, e.g. +84901234567.

preferences.title: Language & Preferences
preferences.description: Choose how ICCP should present your interface across devices.

security.title: Security
security.description: Keep your account secure by regularly updating your password.
security.passwordDescription: Use a strong password and change it whenever you suspect unusual activity.

passwordDialog.title: Password Security
passwordDialog.description: Verify your identity by OTP, then set a new password to protect your account.
passwordDialog.stepTwoDescription: Choose and confirm your new password
passwordDialog.securityTip: For security, OTP expires quickly. Use a strong password with at least 8 characters.
passwordDialog.headerDescription: Send OTP to your email, then set your new password.
passwordDialog.otpSentMessage: OTP sent. Please check your inbox.
passwordDialog.missingEmailDescription: Unable to reset password because your email is not available.

toasts.otpEmailMissing: Unable to send OTP because your email is missing.
toasts.otpSent: OTP has been sent to your email.
toasts.resetEmailMissing: Unable to reset password because your email is missing.
